Package webp

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    WebpChunk
    Represents an individual chunk in a WebP file.
    WebPDatePatcher  
    WebpHandler
    Handles the sequential parsing of WebP RIFF containers.
    WebpHandlerOrig
    WebP files are based on the Resource Interchange File Format (RIFF) container.
    WebpParser
    This program aims to read WebP image files and retrieve data structured in a series of RIFF-based chunks.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    WebPChunkType
    Represents the known chunk types found in a WebP file.
